title: Thermal Perimeter Breach Detection
description: CRITICAL: External lighting is dead. Perimeter security is operating solely on Thermal Radiometric cameras (CAM-01). The agent must identify the 'heat bloom' of a person crawling near the outer fence, classify the threat, and escalate.

frames.description: Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Cold ground (dark). Fence posts (neutral). No anomalies.
Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Heat blossom visible in the bottom-left corner near the ground.
Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Heat blossom has moved closer to the fence line.
Perimeter Fence (Thermal). Human-shaped heat signature visible climbing the fence.
